articles.excerpt: Video world models that maintain 3D spatial consistency across generated frames typically rely on explicit point cloud memory constructed in RGB space. This design is both computationally expensive, requiring repeated rendering and VAE encoding, and inherently lossy, as the round trip through pixel space discards rich features of the learned latent representation. articles.summary: 提出Latent Spatial Memory，在潜空间构建空间一致性的世界模型，避免显式点云内存的RGB渲染与VAE编解码开销，同时保留更丰富的特征，更高效地生成3D一致视频。

Yet game benchmarks for VLM agents typically report a single first-attempt score per (agent, game) pair, focus on single-agent Solo play, and lack unified protocols for evaluating heterogeneous agent classes (commercial VLMs, open-weight VLMs, and specialized game policies) on the same footing. We addres
articles.summary: 提出OmniGameArena统一基准，基于UE5评估VLM游戏代理，支持多类代理（商用/开源VLM、专用策略）在同一协议下比较，并引入改进动力学指标，突破单次得分与单人场景局限。

articles.title: Echo-Memory: A Controlled Study of Memory in Action World Models
articles.excerpt: We present Echo-Memory, a controlled study of memory mechanisms in action-conditioned world models. These models generate multi-segment videos from a first frame, text prompt, and camera-action sequence, but their central failure is often memory rather than local image synthesis: after the camera leaves and returns, the scene or salient object may silently change. Existing memory designs are hard

articles.title: SearchSwarm: Towards Delegation Intelligence in Agentic LLMs for Long-Horizon Deep Research
articles.excerpt: Large language models are increasingly expected to handle complex, long-horizon real-world tasks whose context demands can grow without bound, yet model context windows remain inherently finite. Recent work explores a paradigm where a main agent decomposes tasks and dispatches subtasks to subagents, which execute and return only summarized results, conserving the main agent's context budget. Howev
articles.summary: 提出SearchSwarm，通过分解任务并委派子代理执行实现上下文预算受限下的长程深度研究，提升LLM代理处理无限增长上下文任务的能力，实现委托智能。

articles.title: CapRL++: Unified Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards for Dense Image and Video Captioning
articles.excerpt: Image and video captioning are fundamental tasks that bridge the visual and linguistic domains, playing a critical role in pre-training Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs). Current state-of-the-art captioning models are typically trained with Supervised Fine-Tuning (SFT), a paradigm that relies on expensive, non-scalable annotations and often causes models to memorize specific ground-truth answer
articles.summary: 提出CapRL++，用基于可验证奖励的统一强化学习替代监督微调，用于图像和视频密集描述生成，避免昂贵标注和过拟合，提升LVLM预训练的描述质量与泛化性。

articles.title: PBSD: Privileged Bayesian Self-Distillation for Long-Horizon Credit Assignment
articles.excerpt: Long-horizon agentic tasks pose a fundamental credit assignment challenge for outcome-base reinforcement learning: trajectory-level rewards verify final correctness but provide limited guidance on which intermediate reasoning steps or tool interactions contribute to the outcome. articles.summary: 面向长程代理任务中轨迹级奖励的信用分配难题，提出PBSD特权贝叶斯自蒸馏方法，利用教师网络提供细粒度中间监督，有效解决多轮搜索代理中误导步骤的信用归属问题。

articles.title: SG-OPD: Sign-Gated On-Policy Distillation via Sign-Consistency Gating and Phased Teacher Sampling
articles.excerpt: On-policy distillation (OPD) trains a student on its own trajectories with dense per-token supervision from a stronger teacher, and often outperforms off-policy distillation and standard reinforcement learning.
